page_title: Link an application to your IRCC secure account - Canada.ca
h1: Link an application to your IRCC secure account

h2: How to link an application to your IRCC secure account
Top questions about linking your application to an online account

sections.heading: Applications that can be linked
items: Not all applications can be linked. Check if you can link your application before proceeding.

sections.heading: How to link an application to your IRCC secure account
items: You can try to link an application 5 times. If it doesn’t work after 5 tries, you’ll be locked out for 24 hours.
After you link your application, you won’t receive paper letters about your application. We’ll send messages about your application to your account.
If you’re using a representative, they’ll lose access when you link the application to your account.
Find out how to change or cancel your representative.
bullets: Follow the steps to sign into your online account or create a new one .
In your account, under “View the applications you submitted”, click on “Add (link) your application to your account to check your status”.
Enter the information exactly as you did on your original application. If you made updates after you applied, enter the most recent information.

sections.heading: Top questions about linking your application to an online account
